using System;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Contracts
{
    public interface IDiaExceptionNotificationService
    {
        Task NotifyRetryExhaustedAsync(
            string fileName,
            string failureType,
            Exception exception,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}

--------------------------

using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using System;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Contracts;

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Services
{
    public class DiaExceptionNotificationService : IDiaExceptionNotificationService
    {
        private readonly ILogger<DiaExceptionNotificationService> _logger;

        public DiaExceptionNotificationService(
            ILogger<DiaExceptionNotificationService> logger)
        {
            _logger = logger;
        }

        public Task NotifyRetryExhaustedAsync(
            string fileName,
            string failureType,
            Exception exception,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            _logger.LogError(
                exception,
                "DIA exception notification required. FailureType: {FailureType}, FileName: {FileName}, TechnologyTeam: {TechnologyTeam}, EstateManagementTeam: {EstateManagementTeam}.",
                failureType,
                fileName,
                "Estate_Guardians@westpac.co.nz",
                "Collections_Leaders@westpac.co.nz");

            return Task.CompletedTask;
        }
    }
}
